# Multi Variant Regression

**Summary**: A statistical method to estimate the relationship between a dependent variable and multiple independent variables.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2025-rachmadan|Rachmadan, 2025]] compared machine learning models against traditional multi-variant regression.

## Scientific Context

- [[2025-rachmadan|Rachmadan, 2025]] Standard method for developing Ground Motion Prediction Equations (GMPEs).

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2025-rachmadan|Rachmadan, 2025]] Statistical modeling of ground motion data.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Identified epicentral distance (Repi) and Moment Magnitude (Mw) as primary predictors for PGA. ([[2025-rachmadan|Rachmadan, 2025, p. 82]])
